mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO app_human_chat_delivery_log ( message_id, conversation_key, target_user_id, channel, event_type, status, request_payload_json, response_payload_json ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{conversationKey}, #{targetUserId}, #{channel}, #{eventType}, #{status},
CAST(#{requestPayloadJson} AS JSON)
NULL
,
CAST(#{responsePayloadJson} AS JSON)
NULL
)
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id AS id, d.message_id AS messageId, d.conversation_key AS conversationKey, d.target_user_id AS targetUserId, d.channel AS channel, d.event_type AS eventType, d.status AS status, d.request_payload_json AS requestPayload, d.response_payload_json AS responsePayload, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM app_human_chat_delivery_log d
ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.id AS id, d.message_id AS messageId, d.conversation_key AS conversationKey, d.target_user_id AS targetUserId, d.channel AS channel, d.event_type AS eventType, d.status AS status, d.request_payload_json AS requestPayload, d.response_payload_json AS responsePayload, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM app_human_chat_delivery_log d WHERE d.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
